---
title: "10. MR + coloc"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---
  
```{r setup, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)

options(timeout = 36000)
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
options(download.file.method = "curl")
options(download.file.extra = "-k -L")

options(BioC_mirror = "https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/bioconductor")
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/CRAN/"))
```

# Loading Packages
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(TwoSampleMR)
library(MRPRESSO)
library(coloc)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ieugwasr)
```

# MR

## Step 1: Files and folder
```{r}
rm(list = ls())
gc()

# outcome file
outcome_file <- "../data/raw/opengwas/Jurgens_DCM_GWAS/DCM_GWAS/Jurgens_DCM_GWAS_META.tsv.gz"

# GTEx v8 heart left ventricle data
eqtl_signif_file <- "../data/raw/opengwas/GTEx_Analysis_v8_eQTL/Heart_Left_Ventricle.v8.signif_variant_gene_pairs.txt.gz"
eqtl_egene_file  <- "../data/raw/opengwas/GTEx_Analysis_v8_eQTL/Heart_Left_Ventricle.v8.egenes.txt.gz"

# Hub genes
hub6 <- c("STAT3", "HIF1A", "SERPINE1", "BCL2L1", "CDKN1A", "CASP1")

# output folder
out_dir <- "../data/processed/opengwas"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

## Step 2: Loading GTEx genes data and matching the gene_id for Hub gene
```{r}
egenes <- fread(eqtl_egene_file, header = TRUE, data.table = FALSE)

gene_map <- egenes %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, gene_name) %>%
  distinct(gene_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

hub_genes <- gene_map %>% filter(gene_name %in% hub6)
if(nrow(hub_genes) == 0) stop("Gene_id corresponding to Hub gene not found, please check for gene name matching")

cat("Find the following Hub genes and their gene_id:\n")
print(hub_genes)
```

## Step 3: Loading significant eQTL data, retaining only the association of Hub genes
```{r}
signif <- fread(eqtl_signif_file, 
                select = c("variant_id", "gene_id", "pval_nominal", "slope", "slope_se", 
                           "maf", "ma_samples", "ma_count"),
                data.table = FALSE)

names(signif)[names(signif) == "pval_nominal"] <- "pvalue"

signif_hub <- signif %>% filter(gene_id %in% hub_genes$gene_id)

rm(signif); gc()

cat("Number of eQTL rows after screening:", nrow(signif_hub), "\n")
```

## Step 4: function: GTEx variant_id 转 GWAS ID_B38 格式
```{r}
gtex_to_gwas_id <- function(variant_id) {
  # 去掉 chr 前缀和 _b38 后缀
  x <- gsub("^chr", "", variant_id)
  x <- gsub("_b38$", "", x)
  # 分割为 chr_pos_ref_alt
  parts <- strsplit(x, "_")[[1]]
  if(length(parts) >= 4) {
    # 将 ref 和 alt 转为大写
    parts[3] <- toupper(parts[3])
    parts[4] <- toupper(parts[4])
    result <- paste(parts[1], parts[2], parts[3], parts[4], sep=":")
  } else {
    # 降级方案：直接替换下划线为冒号并转大写
    result <- gsub("_", ":", x)
    result <- toupper(result)
  }
  return(result)
}

# 反向转换: GWAS ID_B38 -> GTEx variant_id（将等位基因转为小写以匹配GTEx原始格式）
gwas_to_gtex_id <- function(id_b38) {
  # 输入: "6:36307545:G:A" 或 "1:54712:TTTTC:T"
  # 输出: "chr6_36307545_g_a_b38" (小写等位基因)
  parts <- strsplit(id_b38, ":")[[1]]
  if(length(parts) >= 4) {
    parts[3] <- tolower(parts[3])
    parts[4] <- tolower(parts[4])
    result <- paste(parts[1], parts[2], parts[3], parts[4], sep="_")
  } else {
    result <- gsub(":", "_", id_b38)
    result <- tolower(result)
  }
  result <- paste0("chr", result, "_b38")
  return(result)
}
```

## Step 5: Loading outcome GWAS data
```{r}
outcome_gwas <- fread(outcome_file, header = TRUE, data.table = FALSE)

required_cols <- c("ID_B38", "EA", "NEA", "BETA", "SE", "P", "EAFREQ", "N_cases", "N_controls", "rsID")
if(!all(required_cols %in% names(outcome_gwas))) {
  stop("GWAS文件缺少必需列，请检查列名。现有列: ", paste(names(outcome_gwas), collapse=", "))
}

# 创建GTEx风格的SNP 
gwas <- outcome_gwas %>%
  transmute(
    ID_B38 = ID_B38,               # 格式 "chr:pos:ref:alt"
    effect_allele = EA,
    other_allele = NEA,
    beta = BETA,
    se = SE,
    pval = P,
    eaf = EAFREQ,
    N_cases = N_cases,
    N_controls = N_controls,
    N_total = N_cases + N_controls
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(beta), !is.na(se), !is.na(pval), !is.na(effect_allele), !is.na(other_allele))
cat("GWAS清洗后行数:", nrow(gwas), "\n")
```

## Step 6: MR and colon for each Hub gene
```{r}
PVAL_THRESH <- 1e-4
all_mr_results <- list()
all_coloc_results <- list()

for(i in 1:nrow(hub_genes)) {
  gene_name <- hub_genes$gene_name[i]
  gene_id   <- hub_genes$gene_id[i]
  cat("\n==== 处理基因:", gene_name, "======\n")
  
  # (1) 提取该基因的eQTL并筛选显著IVs
  eqtl_df <- signif_hub %>% filter(gene_id == !!gene_id)
  if(nrow(eqtl_df) == 0) {
    cat("跳过: 无eQTL数据\n")
    next
  }

    sig_eqtl <- eqtl_df %>% filter(pvalue < PVAL_THRESH)
  if(nrow(sig_eqtl) == 0) {
    cat("跳过: 无显著eQTL (p <", PVAL_THRESH, ")\n")
    next
  }
  cat("显著eQTL数量 (p<", PVAL_THRESH, "):", nrow(sig_eqtl), "\n")
  
  # 构建暴露数据（TwoSampleMR格式）
  tmp <- strsplit(sig_eqtl$variant_id, "_")
  exposure_raw <- data.frame(
    SNP = sig_eqtl$variant_id,
    effect_allele = sapply(tmp, function(x) x[length(x)-1]),  # alt
    other_allele = sapply(tmp, function(x) x[length(x)-2]),  # ref
    beta = sig_eqtl$slope,
    se = sig_eqtl$slope_se,
    pval = sig_eqtl$pvalue,
    eaf = sig_eqtl$maf,
    samplesize = 462,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  exposure_dat <- TwoSampleMR::format_data(
    exposure_raw, type = "exposure",
    snp_col = "SNP", beta_col = "beta", se_col = "se",
    effect_allele_col = "effect_allele", other_allele_col = "other_allele",
    eaf_col = "eaf", pval_col = "pval", samplesize_col = "samplesize"
  )
  exposure_dat$exposure <- gene_name
  
  # (3) 构建暴露数据
  tmp <- strsplit(sig_eqtl$variant_id, "_")
  exposure_raw <- data.frame(
    SNP = sig_eqtl$variant_id,
    effect_allele = sapply(tmp, function(x) tolower(x[length(x)-1])),  # 小写保持一致
    other_allele = sapply(tmp, function(x) tolower(x[length(x)-2])),
    beta = sig_eqtl$slope,
    se = sig_eqtl$slope_se,
    pval = sig_eqtl$pvalue,
    eaf = sig_eqtl$maf,
    samplesize = 462,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  exposure_dat <- TwoSampleMR::format_data(
    exposure_raw, type = "exposure",
    snp_col = "SNP", beta_col = "beta", se_col = "se",
    effect_allele_col = "effect_allele", other_allele_col = "other_allele",
    eaf_col = "eaf", pval_col = "pval", samplesize_col = "samplesize"
  )
  exposure_dat$exposure <- gene_name
  
  # (4) 匹配结局（统一转为大写比较）
  gwas_ids_upper <- sapply(exposure_dat$SNP, function(snp) toupper(gtex_to_gwas_id(snp)))
  gwas_sub <- gwas %>% filter(toupper(ID_B38) %in% gwas_ids_upper)
  if(nrow(gwas_sub) == 0) {
    cat("跳过: GWAS中无匹配SNP\n"); next
  }
  cat("GWAS匹配到的SNP数量:", nrow(gwas_sub), "\n")
  
  # (5) 将GWAS子集的ID_B38转回原始GTEx ID（小写形式）
  gwas_sub$SNP_original <- exposure_dat$SNP[match(toupper(gwas_sub$ID_B38), gwas_ids_upper)]
  outcome_raw <- gwas_sub %>%
    transmute(
      SNP = SNP_original,
      effect_allele = effect_allele,
      other_allele = other_allele,
      beta = beta, se = se, pval = pval, eaf = eaf
    )
  outcome_dat <- TwoSampleMR::format_data(
    outcome_raw, type = "outcome",
    snp_col = "SNP", beta_col = "beta", se_col = "se",
    effect_allele_col = "effect_allele", other_allele_col = "other_allele",
    eaf_col = "eaf", pval_col = "pval"
  )
  outcome_dat$outcome <- "DCM"
  
  # (6)谐调
  harmonised <- harmonise_data(exposure_dat, outcome_dat, action = 2)
  if(nrow(harmonised) == 0) {
    cat("谐调后无有效SNP\n"); next
  }
  cat("谐调后有效IV数量:", nrow(harmonised), "\n")
  
  # (7)F统计量
  harmonised <- harmonised %>% mutate(F_statistic = (beta.exposure / se.exposure)^2)
  f_median <- median(harmonised$F_statistic, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("F统计量中位数:", round(f_median, 2), "\n")
  
  # (8)MR主分析
  if(nrow(harmonised) >= 2) {
    mr_res <- mr(harmonised, method_list = c("mr_ivw", "mr_egger_regression", "mr_weighted_median"))
  } else {
    mr_res <- mr(harmonised, method_list = "mr_wald_ratio")
  }
  
  mr_res <- generate_odds_ratios(mr_res)
  all_mr_results[[gene_name]] <- mr_res
  print(mr_res)
  
  # (9)敏感性分析（IV≥3）
  if(nrow(harmonised) >= 3) {
    pleio <- mr_pleiotropy_test(harmonised)
    cat("MR-Egger截距p =", pleio$pval, "\n")
    presso <- tryCatch(
      mr_presso(BetaOutcome = "beta_outcome", BetaExposure = "beta_exposure",
                SdOutcome = "se_outcome", SdExposure = "se_exposure",
                data = harmonised, OUTLIERtest = TRUE, DISTORTIONtest = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if(!is.null(presso)) cat("MR-PRESSO全局p =", presso$`MR-PRESSO results`$`Global Test`$Pvalue, "\n")
  }
  
  # 绘图
  p_scatter <- mr_scatter_plot(mr_res, harmonised)[[1]] + ggtitle(paste(gene_name, "- DCM"))
  
  ggsave(paste0("../figures/main/0",i,"_scatter.pdf"), p_scatter, width=7, height=5)
  
  if(nrow(harmonised) >= 2) {
    p_forest <- mr_forest_plot(mr_singlesnp(harmonised))[[1]] + ggtitle(gene_name)
    ggsave(paste0("../figures/main/0",i,"_forest.pdf"), p_forest, width=7, height=5)
  }
  
  p_funnel <- mr_funnel_plot(mr_singlesnp(harmonised))[[1]] + ggtitle(gene_name)
  ggsave(paste0("../figures/main/0",i,"_funnel.pdf"), p_funnel, width=7, height=5)
  p_loo <- mr_leaveoneout_plot(mr_leaveoneout(harmonised))[[1]] + ggtitle(gene_name)
  ggsave(paste0("../figures/main/0",i,"_leaveoneout.pdf"), p_loo, width=7, height=5)
  
  # Steiger检验
  steiger <- tryCatch(directionality_test(harmonised), error = function(e) NULL)
  if(!is.null(steiger)) cat("Steiger检验 p =", steiger$steiger_pval, "\n")
  
  # Coloc共定位（使用全部eQTL，不限P值）
  all_eqtl <- eqtl_df %>%
    select(SNP = variant_id, beta = slope, se = slope_se, MAF = maf) %>%
    mutate(varbeta = se^2) %>%
    filter(!is.na(beta), !is.na(MAF), MAF > 0, MAF < 1)
  all_eqtl$ID_B38_upper <- sapply(all_eqtl$SNP, function(snp) toupper(gtex_to_gwas_id(snp)))
  coloc_merge <- gwas %>%
    mutate(ID_B38_upper = toupper(ID_B38)) %>%
    filter(ID_B38_upper %in% all_eqtl$ID_B38_upper) %>%
    select(ID_B38_upper, beta, se, eaf, pval) %>%
    rename(varbeta = se, MAF = eaf) %>%
    mutate(varbeta = varbeta^2) %>%
    inner_join(all_eqtl, by = c("ID_B38_upper" = "ID_B38_upper"), suffix = c(".outcome", ".exposure"))
  
  if(nrow(coloc_merge) >= 50) {
    N_cases <- unique(gwas$N_cases)[1]
    N_controls <- unique(gwas$N_controls)[1]
    if(is.na(N_cases)) { N_cases <- 4000; N_controls <- 16000 }
    N_total <- N_cases + N_controls
    coloc_input_exposure <- list(
      beta = coloc_merge$beta.exposure,
      varbeta = coloc_merge$varbeta.exposure,
      type = "quant",
      snp = coloc_merge$SNP,
      MAF = coloc_merge$MAF.exposure,
      N = 462
    )
    coloc_input_outcome <- list(
      beta = coloc_merge$beta.outcome,
      varbeta = coloc_merge$varbeta.outcome,
      type = "cc",
      snp = coloc_merge$SNP,
      MAF = coloc_merge$MAF.outcome,
      N = N_total,
      s = N_cases / N_total
    )
    coloc_res <- coloc.abf(coloc_input_exposure, coloc_input_outcome)
    all_coloc_results[[gene_name]] <- coloc_res
    cat("Coloc后验概率:\n"); print(coloc_res$summary)
    
    
    # 绘图
    pp_df <- data.frame(SNP = coloc_merge$SNP, PP.H4 = coloc_res$results$SNP.PP.H4)
    pp_df <- pp_df[order(-pp_df$PP.H4), ]
    top_n <- min(100, nrow(pp_df))
    p_coloc <- ggplot(pp_df[1:top_n, ], aes(x = seq_len(top_n), y = PP.H4)) +
      geom_point() + theme_bw() +
      labs(title = paste(gene_name, "- Coloc PP.H4 (top", top_n, "SNPs)"),
           x = "SNP index", y = "Posterior probability H4")
    ggsave(paste0("../figures/main/0",i,"_coloc_pph4.pdf"), p_coloc, width=8, height=4)
  } else {
    cat("Coloc共同SNP不足50，跳过\n")
  }
  
  # 反向MR
  cat("反向MR (DCM → 基因表达)...\n")
  dcm_sig <- gwas %>% filter(pval < 5e-8)
  if(nrow(dcm_sig) > 0) {
    dcm_sig$GTEx_ID <- sapply(dcm_sig$ID_B38, gwas_to_gtex_id)
    rev_exp <- eqtl_df %>% filter(variant_id %in% dcm_sig$GTEx_ID) %>%
      select(SNP = variant_id, beta = slope, se = slope_se, eaf = maf, pval = pvalue) %>%
      mutate(samplesize = 462)
    if(nrow(rev_exp) > 0) {
      rev_exposure <- dcm_sig %>% filter(GTEx_ID %in% rev_exp$SNP) %>%
        mutate(SNP = GTEx_ID, samplesize = N_total)
      rev_exposure_dat <- format_data(
        rev_exposure, type = "exposure",
        snp_col = "SNP", beta_col = "beta", se_col = "se",
        effect_allele_col = "effect_allele", other_allele_col = "other_allele",
        eaf_col = "eaf", pval_col = "pval", samplesize_col = "samplesize"
      )
      rev_exposure_dat$exposure <- "DCM"
      rev_outcome_dat <- format_data(
        rev_exp, type = "outcome",
        snp_col = "SNP", beta_col = "beta", se_col = "se",
        effect_allele_col = "effect_allele", other_allele_col = "other_allele",
        eaf_col = "eaf", pval_col = "pval", samplesize_col = "samplesize"
      )
      rev_outcome_dat$outcome <- gene_name
      rev_harm <- harmonise_data(rev_exposure_dat, rev_outcome_dat, action = 2)
      if(nrow(rev_harm) > 0) {
        rev_mr <- mr(rev_harm, method_list = "mr_ivw")
        if(nrow(rev_mr) > 0) {
          cat("反向MR IVW OR =", exp(rev_mr$b), ", p =", rev_mr$pval, "\n")
        }
      }
    }
  } else {
    cat("DCM GWAS无全基因组显著SNP，跳过反向MR\n")
  }
  
  
}
```

## Step 7:
```{r}
if(length(all_mr_results) > 0) {
  combined_mr <- bind_rows(all_mr_results, .id = "Gene")
  write.csv(combined_mr, file.path(out_dir, "all_mr_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("所有MR结果已保存至:", file.path(out_dir, "all_mr_results.csv"), "\n")
}

if(length(all_coloc_results) > 0) {
  coloc_summary <- lapply(names(all_coloc_results), function(g) {
    res <- all_coloc_results[[g]]$summary
    data.frame(Gene = g, t(res))
  }) %>% bind_rows()
  write.csv(coloc_summary, file.path(out_dir, "all_coloc_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Coloc结果汇总已保存\n")
}

cat("\n===== 分析完成！所有图表和结果保存在目录:", out_dir, "=====\n")
```
